sourceSql: SELECT COALESCE(user_id, 0) FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';
expectedSql: SELECT IFNULL(user_id, 0) FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY;

sourceSql: SELECT id, name FROM products LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
expectedSql: SELECT id, name FROM products LIMIT 20, 10;

sourceSql: SELECT first_name || ' ' || last_name AS full_name FROM employees;
expectedSql: SELECT CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name FROM employees;

sourceSql: SELECT id, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dept_id ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM student_scores;
expectedSql: SELECT id, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dept_id ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM student_scores;

sourceSql: SELECT order_id, amount FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month';
expectedSql: SELECT order_id, amount FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 MONTH;

sourceSql: SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM hire_date) AS hire_year FROM staff;
expectedSql: SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM hire_date) AS hire_year FROM staff;

sourceSql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM items GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY cnt DESC;
expectedSql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM items GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY cnt DESC;

sourceSql: SELECT a.id, b.detail FROM table_a a LEFT JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.a_id WHERE b.status IS NOT NULL;
expectedSql: SELECT a.id, b.detail FROM table_a a LEFT JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.a_id WHERE b.status IS NOT NULL;

sourceSql: SELECT IFNULL(score, 0) AS final_score FROM exam_results WHERE status = 'PASSED';
expectedSql: SELECT COALESCE(score, 0) AS final_score FROM exam_results WHERE status = 'PASSED';

sourceSql: SELECT DATE_ADD(order_date, INTERVAL 30 DAY) FROM orders;
expectedSql: SELECT order_date + INTERVAL '30 DAY' FROM orders;

sourceSql: SELECT id, name FROM users LIMIT 10, 50;
expectedSql: SELECT id, name FROM users LIMIT 50 OFFSET 10;

sourceSql: SELECT CONCAT(city, ', ', country) AS location FROM addresses;
expectedSql: SELECT city || ', ' || country AS location FROM addresses;

sourceSql: SELECT DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AS last_week;
expectedSql: SELECT NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAY' AS last_week;

sourceSql: SELECT department_id, AVG(salary) AS avg_sal FROM employees GROUP BY department_id HAVING avg_sal > 5000;
expectedSql: SELECT department_id, AVG(salary) AS avg_sal FROM employees GROUP BY department_id HAVING avg_sal > 5000;

sourceSql: SELECT * FROM sales WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31' ORDER BY amount DESC;
expectedSql: SELECT * FROM sales WHERE sale_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31' ORDER BY amount DESC;

sourceSql: SELECT u.id, u.username, o.total_amount FROM users u INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) o ON u.id = o.user_id;
expectedSql: SELECT u.id, u.username, o.total_amount FROM users u INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) o ON u.id = o.user_id;
